profile.name: art-syntax
profile.headline: Web Designer
about: I am a student who is pursuing a career as a web designer.
My work combines technical exploration with a builder mindset: understand the problem, test the system, and share what actually works.

research.narrative: I am interested in systems that can observe state, use tools, evaluate outcomes, and take bounded actions with clear evidence and human oversight.

focus.name: AI Agents
focus.description: Autonomous workflows, tool use, evaluation, and reliable agent behavior.

focus.name: Applied AI
focus.description: Turning model capabilities into useful and testable software systems.

focus.name: Developer Tools
focus.description: Better workflows for building, testing, and operating modern software.
